aboutText: I got into Roblox scripting because I wanted to build things that actually felt good to play. That curiosity turned into a serious craft — server-authoritative combat systems, persistent data layers, fluid UIs — all written in Luau that scales as your game grows.
I take commissions seriously. You'll get clean, readable code with zero "we'll fix it later" logic. Whether it's one tight feature or an entire game framework, I ship it right the first time.

codeSnippet.raw:
-- // PRENZE — CombatService (server-authoritative)

local CombatService = {}
CombatService.__index = CombatService

local Settings = { Damage = 25, Cooldown = 0.6, Range = 10 }

function CombatService.New(Config: table): table
	return setmetatable({
		_Config    = setmetatable(Config or {}, { __index = Settings }),
		_Cooldowns = {},
	}, CombatService)
end

function CombatService:ProcessHit(Attacker: Model, Target: Model): boolean
	local Now = workspace:GetServerTimeNow()
	if (Now - (self._Cooldowns[Attacker] or 0)) < self._Config.Cooldown then return false end
	if (Attacker.HumanoidRootPart.Position - Target.HumanoidRootPart.Position).Magnitude > self._Config.Range then return false end

	Target:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("Humanoid"):TakeDamage(self._Config.Damage)
	self._Cooldowns[Attacker] = Now
	return true
end

return CombatService
